1: As Tone 1, the way of being that most aligns you with your purpose in life, is to be one with Source. One with Source, you ARE Source. As you are created in the image and likeness of your Creator, you are created with the power to create and are thus co-Creator. With your life as a clean sheet, you as the author may create it however you choose. Implicit in co-Creatorship is that the underlying purpose of all things be for the highest good of all. Be clear about and consistently ‘come from’ or ‘act out of’ your purpose and vision. This is what causes spirit in you to be activated within you. Know that it greatly facilitates your being a powerful co-Creator when you live each goal or vision as though it has already come into being. For example clearly visualise, hear, feel, taste and smell the surroundings, atmosphere and results of the realisation of your vision. Be the person who would fulfil such a purpose or function. Hold up a light to others to be ‘purpose-focussed’. A great gift you can give to others (while fulfilling your own highest purpose) is to help them be clear abour their purpose and to stay on track with it, in other words ‘to be on purpose’ in life. Yet there is nothing as credible as leadership by example. Alongside the utilising of your qualities, gifts, talent and skills, the key in life to your success and prosperity is to remember your purpose generally, yet more specifically to always stay clear about tuned in to your original purpose for doing anything, and for your purpose to be aligned with Higher Purpose
2: As Tone 2, ‘Being risking’ is the way of being that will most facilitate growth through personal action: It is said “no pain - no gain”, yet certainly, the lesson of tone 2 is that your growth will only be relative to your degree of risk. Committed to being risking you can be absolutely honest with where you are now and where you choose to ‘be’ or get to. Tone 2 is also about having the courage to be authentic - true to yourself and your vision at all costs. Part of your lesson is to create a healthy ‘tension’ between where you are now and your goals and dreams. Like stretching an elastic band from a hand held held further back to one out front, so the tension pulls you forward, yet without such a shock to your system that the elastic band ‘snaps’. The elastic band - your path to achievement, remains stabilised yet flexible. Another aspect of living in alignment with Tone 2 is seeing the positive in every ‘negative’, or every challenge as a growing opportunity. This is another way of pulling the elastic forward. Again, when you’re being like the elastic - stable yet flexible - you embrace challenge and the tension is the positive stress that grows you. By embracing it rather than resisting it, it dissolves as a threat, and becomes your climbing partner, giving you a rope up the mountain. When you freely confront, embrace and dance with your challenges, fears and limitations, you free up the energy that is locked up in fear and resistance. This generates life-force, pranha or chi energy supporting you to better yourself, evolve, and become the best YOU, you can possibly be, through what you do.
3: Your lesson and purpose in life is live through the power of directed feelings in order to serve for the higher good of all life. When you manage your energy, and run your emotions rather than your emotions running you, you are highly effective and your life works. You look inwards to receive guidance and outwards to give service. Being open, places you in a position to receive guidance without judgement, prejudice or attachment to your own previous views, including to guidance that comes in the form of ‘feedback’ from others and the ‘universe’ at large. Being responsible, you are willing and able to respond to the guidance you receive. When you are giving to your higher Self and to others, you become service- and solution- oriented. Your willingness to risk places you in a space of boldly following the guidance that comes from the ‘quantum field’ - the field of all possibilities even if it seems against the norm, against the current, against the grain or simply downright bizarre. It’s the willingness to surrender to a Higher Voice with trust and without fear. This faith fortifies your living sentiently - through evoking your senses, your feelings and your heart. Being ‘out of your mind’ - the real block to lateral thinking and living - you can tap or create real, effective and sometimes exrtraordinary solutions from the quantum field of possibilities.
4: Your role, function and lesson in life is to have a clear context and measure for your intention. Focussed, grounded and disciplined is the way of being that most serves you to create your context and measure: Being focussed keeps you goal- or project-oriented, and targetted on your vision. Being grounded ensures that whatever you generate will be usable ‘on the ground’, and accessible to all. Being disciplined assists you to keep to your commitment and handle what’s in front of you, and what needs to be done. A key principle of tone 4 is that thought always precedes manifestation and more specifically - thought creates. Therefore what you think, be it conscious or unconscious, will create results that mirror those thoughts. Being disciplined is critical to remaining on track with the thoughts you would like to bear fruit. The “context” is the complete set of circumstances, parameters and framework that will shape your intention, goals and dreams. Having a “measure” for your intention is to have defined it that clearly, that you will recognize when it has been achieved. “Measure” also relates to clear communication of the boundaries of operation. These may include values, rules, principles and priorities in all areas of life, confidentiality in relationships, and any other defining features of whatever it is you intend to create. When you define clearly what it is you want to create, you inform and focus your own mind, the minds of others, and higher mind, setting the universal wheels of manifestation in action to mould, fill and fulfil the blueprint.
5: Your Life lesson, function and purpose is to command the universe in to action. You do so firstly by being resourceful. This serves you in a number of ways: Firstly, it means you tap or harness the Source of all. It also means are in touch with your own inner resources, the source of your re-inforcement and power. In addition, it facilitates you researching and finding the resources, tools and information you need. It also means that you turn resources and situations around, to your providence, that did not initially relate to you or serve you. By owning your power, you take a stand on it so it is not just a feeling, but a commitment to acting from the greatness and magnificence of who you are. This way you stand at the centre of your universe, aware of the power within you to create your life the way you choose. You access Spirit (The Universe, God, or Higher Mind), through declaring who you are and what it is you are in the process of achieving. Declaration is more powerful than affirmation because it is a statement of total conviction and power, about who you are. Spirit responds to declaration because it has total clarity, no doubt, true confidence and the fullness of passion. Spirit’s response shows that you have literally commanded the Universe into action.
6: Your role, lesson and function is to create balance, and flow with the rhythm of the universe. There is a ‘too much’ and a ‘too little’ of everything. This is completely personal and subjective and your function is to find the point of balance of everything for you, and to encourage others to do so for themselves. When you are centred in yourself, and in spirit, nothing can throw you in any way. this is the middle path between one extreme and the other, the mid-point in the swing of a metronome or pendulum, and the space between in- and out-breaths. Being ‘in order’ yourself, you are well placed to flow with the order of life and the universe. In this place you can synchronize with the rhythm of your breath, of life, and of any project or task you put your attention to. When you become sufficiently conscious, you discover there is a rhythm to everything. Being in step with the rhythm of life keeps you focussed by balancing your mind, and healthy through balancing your biological system. When your organs, your organizing, and your organization embrace these rhythms, life-force is then channelled for optimum benefit to you and all involved: Your plans and projects become efficient and effective. With your inner and outer resources organized, your life comes to reflect the organic efficiency, effectiveness and order of The Universe itself.
7: Your lesson, function and purpose is to resonate at one with the Universe and thus be a channel for higher mind. To be a clear channel, you (need to) give and receive information and energy clearly. The way of being that most serves you to give and receive is ‘open’. Being ‘expansive’ assists you to ‘raise your game’, raise your frequency or vibration, and expand with a universe that is expanding. Yet most powerful of all is to just BE SOURCE. At Source you have the opportunity to re-experience yourself as a microcosm of the macrocosm, and as co-Creator. This re-aligns you and reminds you of ‘where you are coming from’ and what you are here to do. An effective and powerful way to be a channel for the Universe is first to create physical, emotional and etheric/psychic space for yourself and then raise and re-align your vibration and frequency to that of the Universe. This may be done through quiet, breath, dance, meditation or whatever it takes to ‘move out of the way of yourself’. The moment you move out of the way of yourself, you remove the only barrier blocking/to the full awareness, creativity and power of the universe. As you re-align with Universal Spirit, your heart and senses become attuned, allowing you to ground or earth your experience in your feelings. Feelings re-ignite and re-inspire you, driving you to stay connected with your goal, purpose, project, vision or mission. Where teamwork is involved, your ignition and inspiration spills over into the team.
8: Your life lesson, purpose and function is to integrate and embrace all aspects of yourself, your projects, your life, and the world, in perfect harmony. As Tone 8 you are a ‘harmoniser’. You are lateral, whole, diverse and multi-dimensional. Being acceptant of this truth (about yourself), allows it to manifest and be a reality in your life. When you live this truth, you ‘walk your talk’, and you are in integrity. You are the ‘proof of the pudding’! - the undeniable evidence. As a model of wholeness, you subliminally impress upon, inform and re-activate the minds of those around you with the memory of wholeness. You give them a blueprint, or frame of reference assisting them to ‘regroup’ at all levels. ‘Having it all together’ internally, puts you in a very strong position to recognize when projects, goals and plans are ‘all together’ - cohesive, integrated, synthesized, synchronized, and in harmony. Universal Mind becomes clear that you are committed to what you say you wish to achieve and clear about what exactly that is, so it can provide the precise conditions in which to manifest through you. These are the conditions that fulfill your role as Tone 8 - the creation of the conditions of full readiness for movement into action.
10: Your life lesson and purpose is to acknowledge and recognise evidence of yourself as Creator. Your way 0f being that mosts serves you as Tone 10 is to be wholly committed, grateful, trusting, conscious of your perfection, and fully aware. This way of being attunes you to the ‘grand design’ of all things facilitating personal creation that is in sync with the grand design. Energy is never lost - it only changes form. When you complete from and through these ways of being, the life force energy of the universe is converted into visible or tangible results and form - a denser energy. Completion means bringing things to fruition or wholeness. On occasion this means removing an aspect of your life rather than ‘adding’ one. For example, sometimes it is actually necessary to end a debilitating relationship, be it with a person, habit, aspect or thing in order to create wholeness. Ideas leave not their source, so the result of your creation still carries the level and quality of intention that gave birth to the process. You are then able to manifest, produce and achieve in excellence. Your creation and completions become evidence of yourself as co-Creator, spirit in matter and heaven on earth.
11: Your lesson, purpose and function is to be free, clear and unattached. The ways of being that lead you there are:- vulnerable, loving, humble, forgiving and trusting. These assist you to release, let go, and surrender to your higher Self and to life. They also put you in the space and attitude where you can honour the privilege of your life, your own essence and potential, the essence and potential of all those around you, and the Source of all life. These ways of being allow you to dissolve any attachment you may have be it spiritually as dogma or fixed concepts about the Creator, mentally as judgement or preconception, emotionally as dependency, fear, guilt, envy, anger, grief or sentimentality, or physically as habits, addictions and artificial highs. Through release of all forms and levels of attachment you liberate your heart to fully express who you are, and you free your senses to enhance your experience of life. This leaves you free, clear and unattached, to be completely in the moment, ready for new creation, or the re-creation of yourself and your life.
12: Your lesson, purpose or function in life is to bring the round table or the ‘talking stone’ circle together in a spirit of cooperation and clear communication - to share (give and receive) wisdom. And out of that wisdom to create the next step in your own growth path and the growth path of others. Tone 12 is giving, supportive and courageous. Giving in terms of really sharing who you are first, and what you know, observe and have learned after, for the greater good. Being supportive gives people the ‘space’ to make mistakes and to correct them, the space to share their journey and what it brings up for them, and the space to grow. Having the courage assists you to tell the truth, however painful for the growth of all. It allows you to give and receive honest ‘feedback’ where it is for the highest good of all concerned. Through sharing your life lessons, experiences and insights with focus, clarity, humility, accountability and responsibility (the ability to respond), people will identify with you. They will relate your lessons and insights to themselves, inspiring them to make changes, ‘avoiding re-invention of the wheel’ and allowing the opportunity of life breakthroughs without pain. In identifying with you, your thoughts, and your wisdom born of experience, people have the opportunity to re-experience that we really are all the same - that all minds are joined in the one collective mind.
9: When in tune with your function as Tone 9, there is no space or time to think about or talk about anything - there is only space and time to 'do about' (unless thinking or talking happen to be the core 'getting the job done' activities required at any given time). Your purpose and lesson in life is to manifest, shift, grow and evolve. You are best placed to fulfil all of these when you are 'moved' and pulsate spiritually, mentally, emotionally and physically. When you are creative, excited, passionate, committed, determined, urgent, connected and spontaneous, your way of being takes on two powerful and compatible aspects - NOWNESS and ACTION. In the essence of Tone 9, you engage spirit through action. Your creative action, for the highest good of all, puts you at one with the great Mover of all life and creation. As co-Creator with Source, you seize the moment and act upon, realise and accomplish your intention, goal, vision or project. Embracing the above states of being you are literally 'being in action', a fertile and powerful place from which to grow and evolve. For obvious reasons there is nothing more to be said about this which in fact could have been wrapped up in two words - NOW MOVE!!!
13: Your purpose, lesson and function is to know and experience that you are Source. When you are joyous, enthusiastic, alive, abundant and at peace within and without, you are at one with Source. Enthusiasm comes from 'en thios' - in God. When you are 'being in God' - you may, for example, experience the river of abundance, the breath of aliveness, the eternal flame of joy or the 'peace that passeth all understanding'. Whatever it takes to transcend your physical world and connect with the highest aspect of who you are will lead you to fulfill your purpose. It may take meditation, being in nature, a ceremony or a party. What brings you back to the creative loving Source of all life, brings you Home! Tone 13 is not about doing or having, but 'being'. Although, when your doing comes from your 'beingness', as an honouring and expression of Creation, then you are 'being in action' - which is 'being'. When you celebrate spirit through being, you are connected to Source, and all that is. In this timeless time, and spaceless space, you are able to transcend into a 'higher' reality. Here you might 'bump into your Self' - and recognize that you are Source.
